mapper.select:
SELECT e.id, e.create_time, e.create_user, u.name AS evaluator, e.update_time, e.type, e.reserve_object, p.name AS project_name, e.content FROM evaluate e LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON e.create_user = u.id LEFT JOIN reserve r ON e.reserve_object = r.id LEFT JOIN haircutting_project p ON r.reserve_object = p.id
(u.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{evaluateDTO.keyword},'%') OR p.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{evaluateDTO.keyword},'%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC
